description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a dark woodgrain laminate top and a sturdy metal frame. The tabletop is smooth and flat, providing ample workspace for writing, computing, or other tasks. The legs are made of metal, finished in a light gray color, and feature a T-shaped base for stability. Black plastic or rubber end caps are present at the bottom of the legs, likely to protect floors and add grip. The desk has a minimalist, functional design with no drawers, shelves, or additional attachments. Its clean lines and neutral colors make it suitable for professional or educational environments.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a dark woodgrain top and sturdy gray metal legs, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, the flat tabletop, and the T-shaped metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the desk and the T-shaped base of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the tabletop and the supporting legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the desk's narrow profile and the T-shaped base.
attribute_orientation: The side with the open leg space and unobstructed tabletop is intended to face the user, with the T-shaped legs providing support at either end.
